case_title: CALIFORNIA BANK & TRUST VS. WOO KYUNG KIM et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF CALIFORNIA BANK & TRUST SERVED JUL-22-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SELAM, INC.
